descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers defeat Richmond Sockeyes 7-1 in Centennial Cup playoff game, evening best-of-seven series at 2-2.
descriptionLong: The Red Deer Rustlers defeated the visiting Richmond Sockeyes 7-1 in a Centennial Cup playoff game on April 12, 1987, in Red Deer, Alberta. Dixon Ward and Richard Anderson each scored two goals for the AJHL champion Rustlers, who led 3-0 and 6-0 by period end. Dave Tomlinson scored the Sockeyes' lone goal. The victory evened the best-of-seven series at 2-2, with the teams scheduled to meet again the following night.

attribution.headline: Red Deer Rustlers Defeat Richmond Sockeyes 7-1 in Centennial Cup Playoff
